# Footer

  

### Style Properties:

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| \--exo-component-footer-max-width | Token to modify maximum width of the footer. |
| \--exo-component-footer-width | Token to modify width of the footer. |
| \--exo-component-footer-padding | Token to modify padding of the footer. |
| \--exo-component-footer-left-width | Token to modify left-width of the footer. |
| \--exo-component-footer-right-width | Token to modify right-width of the footer. |

-   Usage:

```

```

.your-class-name {
  \--exo-component-footer-max-width: 1268px;
  \--exo-component-footer-width: 100vw;
  \--exo-component-footer-padding: var(\--exo-spacing-2x-large)
    var(\--exo-spacing-4x-large) var(\--exo-spacing-x-large);
  \--exo-component-footer-left-width: 25%;
  \--exo-component-footer-right-width: 75%;
}

```

```
